XLPE_FRLS_CU.name: XLPE/FRLS/SWA Copper (3.5 Core)
XLPE_FRLS_CU.note: FRLS mandatory per NBC 2016 Part 4 for all cables in buildings

installation_methods.A: Enclosed in conduit in masonry or conduit embedded in ground
installation_methods.B: On perforated cable tray or ladder rack
installation_methods.D: Buried direct in ground or in duct in ground

current_ratings_xlpe_cu_3_5core.description: IS 3961 Part 2 / IS 7098 Pt1 - XLPE copper 3.5 core, ambient 45°C air / 30°C ground

current_ratings_pvc_cu_3_5core.description: IS 3961 Part 1 - PVC FRLS copper 3.5 core

ambient_temp_correction_xlpe.description: Correction factors for ambient air temperature, XLPE cables (IS 3961), reference 45°C

ambient_temp_correction_pvc.description: Correction factors for ambient air temperature, PVC cables (IS 3961), reference 45°C

voltage_drop_xlpe_cu_mv_per_am.description: Voltage drop mV per ampere per metre for XLPE copper 3.5 core

voltage_drop_limits.note: IS 732:2019 Cl 8.3 - 2.5% lighting, 5% power. CEA regulations may require tighter limits.

neutral_sizing.note: India uses 3.5 core cables where neutral = 50% of phase conductor for non-linear loads, full for linear
neutral_sizing.frls_requirement: FRLS (Flame Retardant Low Smoke) mandatory per NBC 2016 Part 4 Section 4.12.1

earthing.earth_electrode: Separate earth pit per IS 3043 Cl 9

india_specific.utility_fuse: HRC fuse per IS 9224 at point of supply
india_specific.metering: Separate metering compartment per CEA regulations
india_specific.harmonic_note: IS 732 mandates harmonic analysis for loads >10kVA with THD>8%
